boundary: Low-intrusion torch.profiler fixed-observation FP16 get_action probe

eagle_tokenizer_cache.description: Cache Eagle tokenizer outputs keyed by expanded prompt text and tokenizer kwargs.

prepare_input_pruning.description: Move only eagle_* tensors to backbone and state/embodiment_id to action head.

action_head_static_cache.description: Cache denoising timestep tensors, action position embeddings, and expanded future tokens.
